title: Notopleura angustissima
intro: Notopleura angustissima, also known as Angustissima, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, commonly found in the Amazon rainforest. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its reported health benefits of reducing oxidative stress and modulating the immune system. The bioactive constituents of Notopleura angustissima include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
taxonomy: Notopleura angustissima is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Notopleura, which is part of the Rubiaceae family. The Rubiaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. This family comprises over 600 genera and more than 13,000 species. Notopleura angustissima is native to South America.
